title: Y@kolyah #3203
definition:
Jecoliah or Jecholiah = "Jehovah is able"

 1) wife of king Amaziah of Judah and mother of king Uzziah (Azariah)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jecoliah or Jecholiah = "Jehovah is able"

 1) wife of king Amaziah of Judah and mother of king Uzziah (Azariah)

    NASB:  Yah has been able, mother of King Azariah
